description_long: This is a four-story brick commercial building with a classic urban facade, housing a deli and pizzeria on the ground floor. The front features a prominent blue and yellow sign reading 'DELI AND PIZZA' above the main entrance, which is flanked by black metal steps and a fire escape ladder. The building has multiple windows on each floor, with black metal fire escapes running along the front and side, typical of older city architecture. The roof is flat and includes skylights, a small rooftop structure, and a visible chimney or vent, suggesting the presence of a pizza oven inside. The side and rear walls are plain brick, with minimal decoration and a single back door. The building sits on a concrete base with adjacent sidewalk and a small paved area, fitting seamlessly into an urban streetscape.
description: A four-story brick pizzeria with a blue and yellow sign, fire escapes, and a flat roof with skylights and a chimney, set on a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deli and pizza sign, main entrance, fire escape, and multiple windows.
description_view_1: Left side view with a plain brick wall, a large blank area, and partial fire escape visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a simple brick facade, several windows, and a back door.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the full fire escape system and additional windows.
